title: Kāneʻohe Bay Coral Bleaching Survey - Year 3 Update
description:
Field footage and data highlights from our Year 3 transect surveys in Kāneʻohe Bay. We cover bleaching prevalence across the north patch reef complex and compare findings to our 2022 and 2023 baselines.

2:30 Methodology Overview
5:45 North Patch Reef Findings
10:00 Bleaching Prevalence Maps
14:15 Temperature Anomaly Correlation
18:30 Community Monitoring Contribution
22:00 What Comes Next
24:30 Acknowledgements
